title: heuchera americana var. hirsuticaulis
intro: Heuchera americana var. hirsuticaulis, also known as Hairy Alum Root, is a perennial plant species within the saxifrage family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. The plant's roots and rhizomes have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and sore throats. Heuchera americana var. hirsuticaulis is typically prepared as a tea or infusion for its medicinal and health benefits, although modern research on its effects is limited.
